# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## Unreleased

- Repository renamed from `k8s-incident-response-skills` → `opsbench`. Versioning reset to 1.0.0 (first stable release under the new name).
- The previous `v1.0` (under the old name) and `v2.0` (under the old name) tags have been removed; their history remains in the git log.
